title: We are the hope that people will one day understand each other
display_title: We are the hope that people will one day understand each other
wikitext: []: We are the hope that people will one day understand each other...             Quote Post by Fade to black » Thu Dec 16, 2021 5:25 pm .. and the words I love you." Do you think it also applies to Lilith and Adam themeselves? While not technically "at war", their roles and presences were set to be mutually exclusive. In the end, they become a single Godlike entity, but still maintaining their individual souls (from what I get). They sort of learned to understand each other, and in their way "love each other". As the dicomtomy of their presences on the same planet at the same time becomes sublimated, so there s hope for all umanity to surpass the dicotomy represented by hedgehog's dilemma, learning to understand each other even without having all of the souls packed together as they were at the beginning. And that s the real way to Evolution. But yeah, might just be mental wankery.

chunks.content:
Article: We are the hope that people will one day understand each other
[]: We are the hope that people will one day understand each other...             Quote Post by Fade to black » Thu Dec 16, 2021 5:25 pm .. and the words I love you." Do you think it also applies to Lilith and Adam themeselves? While not technically "at war", their roles and presences were set to be mutually exclusive. In the end, they become a single Godlike entity, but still maintaining their individual souls (from what I get). They sort of learned to understand each other, and in their way "love each other". As the dicomtomy of their presences on the same planet at the same time becomes sublimated, so there s hope for all umanity to surpass the dicotomy represented by hedgehog's dilemma, learning to understand each other even without having all of the souls packed together as they were at the beginning. And that s the real way to Evolution. But yeah, might just be mental wankery.
